TER=
Guide, aspected by Venus (the lady), Venus is in the sign of
Mother, thus indicating Motherhood of the Lady.
But Moon is Womb. Mercury is the child.
MARS+MOON+MERCURY is the child in the womb ..
Onthe other sideof Mercury is the layer of skin, Moon is the
Bladder (Garbha) and Mars stands for Scissors.
Therefore the native's work is connected with delivering of babies
a Children specialist. A paediatrician/obsterrician.

The native is a Doctor-A Physician.
SATURN+JUPITER+DRAGONTAIL
KARMA+GUIDE+MOKSHA.
Hence the native will be either a guide or a doctor.

A Teacher/Lecturer/Professor in Technical lines (Engineering
lines) Saturn+Mercury aspected by Moon. SATURN+
MERCURY Are in the East. Mars is also in the East.
Therefore SATURN+MERCURY+MARS which is aspected by
Moon.
